Curated gifting collections

Premium leather essentials for corporate gifting.

The Gifting Ledger.

Corporate Bulk Solutions | Rs. PKR Pricing

Most OrderedRs. 2,500 – 3,500

Executive Wallet

Full-grain leather bifold wallet with 6 card slots and embossed logo panel. Available in black, tan, and dark brown.

MOQ: 50 Units
  • Logo Embossing
  • RFID Protection Option
  • Gift Box Included
Rs. 3,500 – 5,500

Leather Notebook

A5 refillable leather-bound notebook with pen loop and business card pocket. Perfect for onboarding kits.

MOQ: 50 Units
  • Custom Inner Pages
  • Gold/Silver Emboss
  • Ribbon Bookmark
Rs. 1,200 – 1,800

Card Holder

Slim full-grain leather cardholder. Holds 8–12 cards. Laser or heat embossing available.

MOQ: 100 Units
  • Slim Profile
  • 8–12 Card Capacity
  • Custom Emboss
Rs. 6,500 – 9,500

Executive Gift Set

Curated set: wallet + notebook + cardholder in premium black gift box with gold ribbon. Ideal for awards gifting.

MOQ: 30 Units
  • Premium Gift Box
  • Matching Leather Set
  • Custom Insert Card

Corporate Gifting Solutions.

Scalable leather gifting infrastructure built for enterprise brands. Crafted with precision in Karachi.

Eid Gifting

Premium leather gifts for Eid ul Fitr and Eid ul Adha. Custom embossed with your brand. Order 4 weeks ahead for on-time delivery.

Employee Onboarding Kits

Leather notebooks, wallets, and card holders in branded gift boxes. Make a first impression that lasts.

Executive Awards

Custom engraved leather portfolios and desk sets for management recognition programs.

Year-End Gifting

Bulk leather gift sets for clients and partners. Consistent quality across 50 to 5,000 units.

Aurel Leather

B2B Manufacturing Division

For gifting agencies, white-label resellers, and bulk corporate suppliers. We are the backend manufacturing partner for brands that need scalable, premium production.

Trade pricing tiers

Our Karachi manufacturing facility combines skilled artisanal craft with modern production precision. Every product is hand-finished, quality checked, and delivered on time.
